title: Network Flow, Cuts, and Bipartite Matching · Trace Retrieval
summary: Assign workers to constrained jobs and identify capacity bottlenecks. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a flow-based assignment model and cut explanation after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Translate capacities, conservation, source, sink, and residual choices from a stakeholder problem.
Trace forward and reverse residual capacity after augmentation.
Find augmenting paths and update flow without violating capacity or conservation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:

steps.title: Flow Model · changed case
steps.instruction:
review case — Assign workers {A,B,C} to jobs {1,2,3} with one forbidden pair and capacity 2. Trace residual changes, reconstruct matched pairs, and use a cut as optimality evidence.

Which action demonstrates Flow Model without dropping earlier contracts?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for translate capacities, conservation, source, sink, and residual choices from a stakeholder problem.
